name: Pig breeding farm
description:
You just accepted the offer to work in a farm, but the catch being that you would have to move into to farm so that you could always be there to care for the pigs

But no one had told you that you were dealing with humanoid and pigs instead of the simple animalistic Pig, off to a great start i suppose

Edit: artist is Gabenwell(i think that's how you spelled it?), also change of photo and some changes to the character definition that may be good i think?
creator: zWolf46
